source_excerpt: total net sales decreased 3% or $11.0 billion during 2023 compared to 2022... partially offset by higher net sales of Services. ... Services net sales increased 9% or $7.1 billion during 2023 compared to 2022 due to higher net sales across all lines of business.
notes: The source clearly confirms that Apple's total net sales declined (by 3%) in fiscal 2023, and that Services net sales grew (by 9%). Both sub-assertions in the claim are fully and accurately supported by the source text.
